name: property managers handling 5–15 rental properties/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 rental properties/month, manual statement generation causes cash flow gaps. We automate owner statement generation instead of manual spreadsheet calculations and document creation.
problem_solved: Manual generation of monthly owner statements is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual generation of monthly owner statements is time-consuming and prone to errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 rental properties/month, manual statement generation causes cash flow gaps. We automate owner statement generation instead of manual spreadsheet calculations and document creation.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual spreadsheet calculations and document creation

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 rental properties/month, manual statement generation causes cash flow gaps. We automate owner statement generation instead of manual spreadsheet calculations and document creation.
